settings.eyebrow: Advanced Retinoid Serum — retinaldehyde serum for textured skin
settings.heading: Smoother skin. In weeks.
settings.subheading: CLARTÉ uses retinaldehyde (a precision retinoid), gluconolactone (a gentle acid), and ceramides (barrier builders) to smooth texture. Safe for reactive skin. From €29 · Save 15% on 3-month supply.
settings.stars_text: ★★★★★ EU-tested. Fragrance-free. Safe for sensitive skin.

settings.label: To Visible Results
settings.source: Visible texture improvement in clinical study

settings.label: Pore Size Reduction
settings.source: Pore size visibly reduced at 8 weeks

settings.title: Smooth texture
settings.description: CLARTÉ smooths rough, bumpy skin. Retinaldehyde speeds cell renewal. Gluconolactone clears surface buildup. No irritation.

settings.title: Smaller-looking pores
settings.description: Clogged pores look large. CLARTÉ clears them. Retinaldehyde refines pore walls. Gluconolactone dissolves buildup around each pore. Visible in weeks.

settings.title: A better base
settings.description: Makeup sits differently on smooth skin. It floats. It blends. It stays. Users need less of it.

settings.heading: One serum. Three results.
settings.body: A serum built around your skin's real needs. Retinaldehyde, gluconolactone, and ceramides working together to deliver visible texture improvement.

settings.title: Retinaldehyde Converts
settings.description: Your skin renews every 28 days. Retinaldehyde (a natural retinoid, one step from the form your skin uses) speeds this up. Old skin cells shed faster. Fresh, smooth cells reach the surface sooner.

settings.title: Gluconolactone Clears
settings.description: Gluconolactone (PHA — poly-hydroxy acid) works on top. Its large molecule stays at the surface. It exfoliates without going deep. No burn. No barrier damage.

settings.title: Ceramides Restore
settings.description: Ceramides (lipid molecules in your skin barrier) hold it all together. They replace what the acid removes. Skin stays hydrated while it repairs. No purge. No burn. Results from week two.

settings.heading: Why smooth skin takes a serum.

settings.quote: “My makeup floats on now instead of sinking into bumps. I used less for the first time in years.”
“Same results as my €60 serum. Half the price. The ingredients checked out.”
“My skin reacts to most things. This was gentle and it still worked.”

settings.heading: Start with smoother skin.
settings.intro_body: You have tried a lot. Spent too much. Still not happy. We know that cycle. CLARTÉ was built to break it.
settings.subheading: Retinaldehyde (precision retinoid). Gluconolactone (gentle acid). Ceramides (barrier support). From €29. No lock-in. Free returns.
